item.title: Join Critically Acclaimed Singer-Songwriter & Pianist Judith Owen Featuring the Callers, The J.O. Big Band, Tonya Boyd-Cannon Choir + more special guest appearances!!
item.description:
Venue: New Orleans Jazz & Blues Market Starts: 2026-04-25T20:30:00.000-04:00 Categories: Music - Cajun, Zydeco, Music - R&B, Funk, Brass Band, MG Indian, Music - Rock, Pop, Roots, Cover, Music - Classical, Music - Jazz & Blues, Music - Acoustic, Songwriter, Ethnic, Music - Other More info: judithowen.net Tickets: https://www.ticketmaster.com/judith-owen-suit-yourself-with-the-new-orleans-louisiana-04-25-2026/event/1B006473A07AF11D
Join Critically Acclaimed Singer-Songwriter & Pianist JUDITH OWEN for the release show of her newest album, ‘Suit Yourself’, set for release April 24 - The lauded vocalist resumes her trajectory of exploring and mining lesser-known jazz and blues gems and turning them into musical powerhouses. ‘Suit Yourself’ is the full Judith Owen experience.
Experience Judith Owen’s ‘Suit Yourself’ with The Callers, The J.O. Big Band, Tonya Boyd-Cannon and more to be revealed , for a Jazz Fest evening performance not to be missed!
The new Standard of Jazz is right here!

item.title: Mitch Woods Club 88 New Orleans Jazzfest residency at Creole Gardens Roadhouse. I’m inviting all my musician friends to sit in and the public to make this a Jazzfest to remember!
item.description:
Venue: Creole Gardens Guest House Starts: 2026-04-25T21:00:00.000-04:00 Categories: Music - Classical, Music - Other, Music - Cajun, Zydeco, Music - R&B, Funk, Brass Band, MG Indian, Music - Acoustic, Songwriter, Ethnic, Music - Rock, Pop, Roots, Cover, Music - Jazz & Blues More info: http://www.mitchwoods.com
Mitch Woods invites all his friends, musical and otherwise to join him in his yearly Jazzfest Residency at the classic New Orleans Roadhouse @ Creole Gardens Guest House and Inn.
I’m inviting all my musician friends to sit in and the public to make this a Jazzfest to remember.
There will be bar and food available. Backline too.
C’mon down each night 8-10 pm after the fest and before the rest!

item.description:
Venue: Blue Nile Starts: 2026-04-25T23:30:00.000-04:00 Categories: Music - Cajun, Zydeco, Music - R&B, Funk, Brass Band, MG Indian, Music - Rock, Pop, Roots, Cover, Music - Classical, Music - Jazz & Blues, Music - Acoustic, Songwriter, Ethnic, Music - Other More info: https://www.showpass.com/the-rumble-blue-nile-april-25-bbjfs/ Tickets: https://www.showpass.com/the-rumble-blue-nile-april-25-bbjfs/

Advance Tickets $20 + Processing Fees & Applicable Taxes at Checkout.
Day of show $25 + Processing Fees & Applicable Taxes at Checkout.
• 2025 Grammy Nominees for Best Regional Roots Album for the album “Stories From The Battlefield”
• 2024 Grammy Nominees for Best Regional Roots Album for the album “Live at the Maple Leaf”
On Mardi Gras morning, your eyes may feast on the intricate and elaborate beadwork of the Indians as they dance down the street, but the first thing you'll hear when they make their way toward you is the back line, known as "the rumble". Featuring seven GRAMMY-nominated musicians, The Rumble is more than just a band — it's an opportunity to be immersed in a wholly unique facet of New Orleans culture. Composed of Big Chief Joseph Boudreaux Jr. of the Young Eagles, trumpeter Aurélien Barnes, trombonist José Maize Jr., bassist TJ Norris, guitarist Ari Teitel, keyboardist Andriu Yanovski, and drummer Trenton O’Neal, the group fuses iconic New Orleans funk in the vein of The Meters and The Neville Brothers — but updated, modern and vibrant befitting the next generation — with electrifying brass and the singular visual splendor of the Black Masking carnival tradition.
All sales are final and refunds are only allowed in limited circumstances such as canceled events. If your event is canceled, postponed, rescheduled, or moved, we will attempt to contact you to update you on the status of the event, and inform you of any refund, credit, or exchange procedures.
All shows are for ages 21 and up. Valid ID required upon entry.

item.title: Mitch Woods Club 88 New Orleans Jazzfest residency at Creole Gardens Roadhouse. I’m inviting all my musician friends to sit in and the public to make this a Jazzfest to remember!
item.description:
Venue: Creole Gardens Guest House Starts: 2026-04-26T18:00:00.000-07:00 Categories: Music - Classical, Music - Other, Music - Cajun, Zydeco, Music - R&B, Funk, Brass Band, MG Indian, Music - Acoustic, Songwriter, Ethnic, Music - Rock, Pop, Roots, Cover, Music - Jazz & Blues More info: http://www.mitchwoods.com
Mitch Woods invites all his friends, musical and otherwise to join him in his yearly Jazzfest Residency at the classic New Orleans Roadhouse @ Creole Gardens Guest House and Inn.
I’m inviting all my musician friends to sit in and the public to make this a Jazzfest to remember.
There will be bar and food available. Backline too.
C’mon down each night 8-10 pm after the fest and before the rest!

item.title: Blue Nile presents Kota Dosa
item.description:
Venue: Blue Nile Starts: 2026-04-27T19:30:00.000-05:00 Categories: Music - Cajun, Zydeco, Music - R&B, Funk, Brass Band, MG Indian, Music - Rock, Pop, Roots, Cover, Music - Classical, Music - Jazz & Blues, Music - Acoustic, Songwriter, Ethnic, Music - Other More info: https://www.bluenilelive.com/
Kota Dosa is a creative music collective known for blending blues, funk, psychedelic rock, and jazz, with roots in New York, New Orleans, and Oregon. Led by brothers Jesse Jake and Cody Luke, the band features powerful vocals, guitar solos, and a notable horn section. They perform original music alongside influential covers and are recognized for their high-energy, genre-bending live shows.
AGES 21+. FREE ADMISSION WITH VALID I.D.

item.title: 19th Annual Backbeat JazzFest Series presents Wil Blades, Herlin Riley, Will Bernard and Donald Harrison Play the Music of Dr. Lonnie Smith
item.description:
Venue: Blue Nile Starts: 2026-04-28T23:00:00.000-04:00 Categories: Music - Cajun, Zydeco, Music - R&B, Funk, Brass Band, MG Indian, Music - Rock, Pop, Roots, Cover, Music - Classical, Music - Jazz & Blues, Music - Acoustic, Songwriter, Ethnic, Music - Other More info: https://www.showpass.com/wil-blades-music-of-dr-lonnie-smith-bbjfs/ Tickets: https://www.showpass.com/wil-blades-music-of-dr-lonnie-smith-bbjfs/
Tuesday April 28
Doors 9:00PM / Show 10:00PM
Advance Tickets $25 + Processing Fees & Applicable Taxes at Checkout.
Jazz organ authority, the legendary Dr. Lonnie Smith has called Wil Blades “the future,” anointing him the heir apparent to “carry on the legend [and] the legacy of the B-3 organ.”
All sales are final and refunds are only allowed in limited circumstances such as canceled events. If your event is canceled, postponed, rescheduled, or moved, we will attempt to contact you to update you on the status of the event, and inform you of any refund, credit, or exchange procedures.
All shows are for ages 21 and up. Valid ID required upon entry.

item.title: Chock full of fun facts, bad jokes, Strip Tease, and prizes, Lefty Lucy’s Burlesque Bingo is a whirlwind of wholesome good times blended with the cheeky sass of Burlesque!
item.description:
Venue: The AllWays Lounge & Cabaret Starts: 2026-04-29T17:30:00.000-06:00 More info: burlesquebingonola.eventbrite.com Tickets: www.burlesquebingonola.eventbrite.com
LEFTY LUCY’S BURLESQUE BINGO features 3 rounds of Bingo with PRIZES EVERY ROUND — including a New Orleans Gift Set with a free shot, PLUS the YOU choose the music for the Burlesque!
GRAND FINALE PRIZE from GLAM JAM plus gifts from local pop-ups!
But wait—there's more!
#EATLOCAL with a New Orleans/Korean Fusion pop-up from NOLA SNACK BAE offering delicious and unique dishes while you play!
This ain’t your Grandma’s Bingo —
but Grandma will love it!
